## Helper Functions for Probabilistic Forecasting with Conformal Prediction

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/mustafaslanCoto/peshbeen/blob/main/peshbeen/helpers.py#L63"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### get_bootstrap_quantiles

``` python

def get_bootstrap_quantiles(
    samples, # Sampled forecast trajectories.
    n_calib, # Number of calibration windows (used for finite-sample correction).
    quantiles, # Desired quantile levels.
    y_forecast, # Point forecasts (used as the ``point_forecast`` column).
): # Columns: ``point_forecast``, ``q_<level>`` for every requested level.

```

*Build a quantile table from bootstrap (or simulation) sample paths.*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/mustafaslanCoto/peshbeen/blob/main/peshbeen/helpers.py#L18"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### get_conformal_quantiles

``` python

def get_conformal_quantiles(
    non_conform, # Absolute residuals from the calibration windows.
    n_calib, # Number of calibration windows.
    quantiles, # Desired quantile levels, e.g. ``[0.1, 0.5, 0.9]``.
    y_forecast, # Point forecasts.
): # Columns: ``point_forecast``, ``q_<level>`` for every requested level.

```

*Build a conformal-prediction quantile table from pre-computed
non-conformity scores.*

## Difference functions for forecast inverse transform

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/mustafaslanCoto/peshbeen/blob/main/peshbeen/helpers.py#L102"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### seasonal_diff

``` python

def seasonal_diff(
    data:Union[np.ndarray, pd.Series], # The input time series data to be differenced.
    seasonal_period:int, # The seasonal period (e.g., 12 for monthly data with yearly seasonality).
)->np.ndarray: # The seasonally differenced time series.

```

*Applies seasonal differencing to a time series.*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/mustafaslanCoto/peshbeen/blob/main/peshbeen/helpers.py#L124"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### undiff_ts

``` python

def undiff_ts(
    original_data:Union[np.ndarray, pd.Series], # The original time series data before differencing.
    differenced_data:Union[np.ndarray, pd.Series], # The differenced time series data to be inverted.
    n:int=1, # The order of differencing applied (default is 1).
)->np.ndarray: # The reconstructed time series after inverting differencing.

```

*Inverts (ordinary) differencing.*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/mustafaslanCoto/peshbeen/blob/main/peshbeen/helpers.py#L152"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### invert_seasonal_diff

``` python

def invert_seasonal_diff(
    orig_data, # The original time series data before seasonal differencing.
    diff_data, # The seasonally differenced time series data to be inverted.
    seasonal_period, # The seasonal period used for differencing (e.g., 12 for monthly data with yearly seasonality).
): # The reconstructed time series after inverting seasonal differencing.

```

*Inverts seasonal differencing.*
